title: The Educator-in-Chief: Where CM Satheesan Cannot Go Wrong
description: With the United Democratic Front’s historic mandate in the 2026 Assembly elections, V.D. Satheesan steps into Cliff House not merely as Kerala’s thirteenth Chief Minister, but as the custodian of an unprecedented generational hope. The massive support that propelled […] The post The Educator-in-Chief: Where CM Satheesan Cannot Go Wrong appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
